prompt: Enhanced photograph of a young black Labrador Retriever puppy, approximately 4 months old, sitting on fresh green farm grass. Glossy jet-black fur catching warm afternoon sunlight with subtle brown undertones visible in strong light. Real fur texture — individual hairs visible, slight shine on the coat. Large warm amber-brown eyes with genuine depth and wet sheen, white catchlight reflection. Broad soft muzzle, shiny black nose with slight nostril detail. Happy relaxed open-mouth expression, bright pink tongue lolling naturally to one side, white teeth visible. Bright red cotton bandana tied neatly around the neck in a simple knot. Puppy proportions — slightly oversized paws, round belly, floppy soft ears. Background: bright green meadow grass softly blurred, wooden farm fence visible in the distance. Shot on Canon EOS R5, 100mm f/2.0, ISO 320, warm afternoon natural sunlight from behind-right creating rim light along the fur edges. Shallow depth of field, dog tack sharp, grass background creamy bokeh. Do not add any digital effects. This is a real dog photograph.
negative_prompt: cartoon, illustration, anime, 3D render, CGI, plastic fur, over-sharpened, dark background, scary, aggressive expression, blurry dog, digital painting, deformed, unrealistic, oversaturated colors

settings.lighting: warm afternoon sun, rim light from behind-right
settings.quality: high detail fur texture, realistic wet eyes
